text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-yeppers! It's the one I bought with<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I just put an itsy-bitsy teenie bit on! I'd<n>hate t'see
it waste 'way in my bag...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I gotcha. But you know, you're not going<n>to get
used to it unless you wear it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I-I know, but... that lipstick's chock full<n>of
mem'ries from our shopp'n trip... I<n>want it t'last...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ahem... W-well, personally, I'm hopingyou use it up sooner rather than later.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Cause then we'll be able to go shopping<n>again,
won't we? Only if you... want to,<n>of course.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wow... 'Course I wanna go! I-I'll apply<n>'nother
coat—no, thirty coats!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, your lips are gonna hate you if<n>you do
that.
